structured_output.reasoning: The root node_modules/dompurify was locked at version 3.4.7, pulled as an optional dependency of jspdf@4.2.1 (which declares dompurify ^3.3.1). Three moderate-severity advisories affect DOMPurify <=3.4.10. Version 3.4.11 is the fix release and is within the existing ^3.3.1 semver range. Running `npm update dompurify` resolved the root copy to 3.4.11 and deduplicated the previously-separate copies in packages/superset-ui-core and plugins/legacy-preset-chart-nvd3 (both already at 3.4.11). After the update, `npm audit` reports zero DOMPurify findings. The change is lockfile-only with no source code modifications.
